victim_side: Persons killed in Halabja during the attack window
formula_note: Low = HRW floor; best/high = common 5,000 estimate.
uncertainty_note: This package is strong for attack-window direct deaths but weak on whether all fatalities can be coded as civilians rather than residents/persons present more generally.
quality_note: Useful atrocity/bombardment numerator; denominator work still missing.
